nasb.text: Seeing the people, He felt compassion for them, because they were distressed and dispirited like sheep without a shepherd.

esv.text: When he saw the crowds, he had compassion for them, because they were harassed and helpless, like sheep without a shepherd.

cnv.text: 他看見群眾，就憐憫他們，因為他們困苦無依，像沒有牧人的羊一樣。

ccb.text: 祂看见众人，心里怜悯他们，因为他们困苦无助，好像没有牧人的羊。

csbs.text: 耶稣看见众人，就对他们动了怜悯之心，因为他们困苦流离，像羊没有牧人那样。
